历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13940 → 12732 → 13100 → 12577 → 16379. In 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 3800 places compared to 2024, hitting the lowest in five years; the cumulative backward shift over the past three years is about 3300 places, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 16379. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 125 in 2021, 117 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 107 in 2024, and 136 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 137, an increase of only 1 compared to 2025, essentially flat, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 40th, having been stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive; a master's graduate's thank-you letter to the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter campus showed humanistic care, enhancing the university's image. Its Douyin heat rating is relatively hot (overall rank 53), indicating above-average attention on short video platforms. No significant admission cutoff gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Grassland Science (A+) and Ecology (A+) are top-tier disciplines, while Chemistry (A-), Geography (A-), and Biology (A-) are advantageous disciplines. Grassland Science and Ecology directly correspond to the enrollment majors of Grassland Science (Base Class) and Ecology (Ecological Informatics Innovation Class), while Chemistry (A-) corresponds to the Chemistry category (including Base Class), providing some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, which is relatively far from Jiangsu Province, making it an inter-provincial study destination. The university's enrollment in Jiangsu Province for Physics Category accounts for a small proportion (about 130 students), and geographical preferences somewhat inhibit Jiangsu candidates' willingness to apply. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social heat/recommendation, matching the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information categories. The number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province has grown continuously from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 521,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 380,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 44% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the essentially flat 2026 enrollment plan, the substantial 44% increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the somewhat positive university reputation, competition is expected to continue intensifying in 2026, with the ranking number further increasing, but the decline narrowing compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16481, with a range of 15981–16981.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15981–16981, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint option (Computer Category, Mathematics Category, Stomatology, and other popular majors historically have rankings significantly above the university cutoff), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 15900), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. Note that Lanzhou University's advantageous disciplines such as Chemistry (A-) and Biology (A-), though with lower social heat, have strong academic strength and high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3243 → 3226 → 4402 → 3225 → 3921, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, it shifted back to 4402, rebounded to 3225 in 2024, and shifted back again to 3921 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, it has cumulatively shifted back by about 700 places, with a baseline of approximately 3921 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 29 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 30 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 32, an increase of 2 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 6.7%, which has a slight pushing-back effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 40th, and has been stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive. An incident where a master's graduate thanked the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus demonstrated humanistic care, enhancing the university's image. On Douyin, its heat rating is relatively hot (overall ranking 53rd), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grassland Science A+ and Ecology A+ are top-tier disciplines, while Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A- are advantageous disciplines. Among the majors enrolled in History Category, History, Cultural Heritage and Museology, etc., match the university's comprehensive positioning, but there is no direct A-class discipline correspondence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social heat rating of relatively hot/recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province was stable between 92,000 and 102,000 from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the total number of examinees is 521,000. Estimated at about 27% of the recent proportion, History Category examinees are about 141,000, an increase of about 45% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Jiangsu Province, making it an inter-provincial study destination. The university enrolls a small number of History Category students in Jiangsu Province (about 30), and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Jiangsu examinees' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the large fluctuations in History Category rankings, the expansion of 2 places in 2026 (+6.7%), the approximately 45% increase in the number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and the relatively positive university reputation, it is expected that the 2026 ranking number will slightly increase from the 2025 baseline of 3921. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4098, with a range of 3598–4598.
